# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates a font table options structure with the specified raw value.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: UInt32)
```

## Constants

- **excludeSynthetic**: The font table excludes synthetic font data.

items.description: The font table excludes synthetic font data.
